products.name: Venmar Air Exchanger Filter
products.description:
Where to Buy Venmar Filters

Need Venmar filters? You’re in luck! Local or online, Venmar filters are available. Save time - buy online. We ship Venmar HEPA filters to Canada and the US.

IMPORTANT — New Packaging Design

The original HEPA filter, part number 04803, is now distributed under the Broan-NuTone brand following the acquisition of Venmar.

Please note that the packaging has recently been updated. The product inside remains an original authentic HEPA filter along with 2 prefilters, offering the same specifications, performance, and compatibility as before.

Overview

Replacement Venmar Air Exchanger Filter - Part number: 04803. Free shipping. For Venmar HEPA 3000. MERV 17. Genuine Venmar Filter for whole-house air exchangers. Ships with 1 true HEPA filter and 2 pre-filters. This filter can help prevent potential respiratory problems. 100% efficiency in trapping airborne particles - including allergens like mold spores and animal dander (1 micron and bigger). Captures microscopic allergens and pollutants, including smoke, dust, and smog. Traps potentially virus-carrying bacterial particles. Reduces household dust. Filter Nominal Size : 20″ x 16″ x 2″

Compatibility

For use with Venmar:

  • HEPA 1000
  • HEPA 2000
  • HEPA 3000
  • HEPA 3100
  • HRV 2500
  • HRV 2600

or with BROAN:

  • HR 1.0
  • HF 2.0
  • HF 3.0
  • HF 3.1
  • HR 2.5
  • HR 2.6 and all other products in this category

Shipping

Enjoy fast FREE SHIPPING on Venmar replacement filter in Canada on all orders. Order today by 11 a.m. and get your order the next business day! Some restrictions apply.

U.S. Orders

U.S. orders are not eligible for free shipping. We are offer a flat shipping rate for the Venmar HEPA filter, along with a handling fee to cover applicable tariff surcharges. These fees are non-refundable if an item is returned.

To Order

We make it easy for you to order from our secure website 24/7. It's fast, it's easy, it's convenient. We accept VISA, MasterCard, and PayPal. Prefer to place your order or ask questions by phone? Our dedicated customer service representatives are ready to assist you between 9 a.m. to 2 p.m. Eastern time when you call (888) 315-0105

Other Details

  • Brand: VENMAR
  • Part number: 04803
  • Included 1 true Venmar HEPA filter
  • Included 2 pre-filters
  • 20 x 16 x 2 inches

Maintenance

If your unit is equipped with the wall control, you should replace your HEPA filter when the control filter maintenance light is on and replace only the pre-filter when the light is flashing. When there is no wall control, you must replace your HEPA filter every 12-18 months and the pre-filter every 6 months* (see the maintenance calendar inside the unit). Under normal filter usage conditions, filter duration may vary.

Warranty

This product is warrantied by the manufacturer for defects for 1 year.

Returns

products.description:

WHY YOU NEED THIS FILTER

Don't let allergens and airborne particles take over your home! With the Honeywell FC100A1037 Furnace Filter, you’ll enjoy the cleanest, healthiest air possible.

This high-efficiency filter ensures optimal airflow while improving the air quality throughout your home. Breathe easier while your HVAC system runs smoothly, saving energy and reducing wear and tear.

SMART SAVINGS

Buy in Bulk & Save: Get 5 filters — save money and avoid last-minute store runs. Always have a replacement on hand!

FAST & FREE SHIPPING*

FREE shipping* is available in most regions, but some restrictions apply. Check our Shipping Policy for details.

COMPATIBILITY

ORDER NOW & BREATHE EASY

Don't wait — your healthier home starts today!

Ordering is fast, easy, and secure 24/7 on our website. We accept VISA, MasterCard, and PayPal. Prefer to speak with us? Call (888) 315-0105, Monday to Friday, 9 a.m. to 2 p.m. ET.

The 12x24x1 Camfil 30/30 high-capacity furnace filter will last you three months -- double that of others! Featuring a 5-STAR Energy Cost Index, this is a genius choice for Canadian homeowners to save cash. Manufactured by the trusted name in high-quality pleated media filters. products.name: City M Air Purifier
products.description:
The City M Air Purifier by Camfil is simply the best. Removes 99.995% of the most difficult and harmful particles to capture. Specifically designed for indoor environments such as homes, offices, schools, hotels, hospitals, and public buildings, it captures the smallest, most harmful contaminants... even those you can't see. products.description:
MERV 8 filter: Upgrade your air filtration system with the PerfectPleat HC M8 by AAF Flanders - the eco-friendly solution. These filters are designed for higher performance and improved efficiency. With an initial MERV 8 rating, the PerfectPleat HC M8 filter becomes even more efficient as it holds more dust.

The self-supporting design promotes airflow and maximizes dust holding capacity, resulting in lower pressure drop and reduced energy consumption. Plus, with no wire backing and 100% incinerable construction, these filters are not only more efficient but also more sustainable.

products.name: Camfil Dual 9 – High-Efficiency, Cost-Saving Filter
products.description:
STOP WASTING MONEY on Filters That Don’t Last!
Upgrade to the Dual 9 and SAVE BIG on Time, Energy & Costs!

You wouldn’t throw money out the window every few months… so why do it with your air filters?

Imagine this:
No more constantly replacing filters. No more high energy bills.
No more wasted time and money on maintenance.

The Camfil Dual 9 is engineered to outlast, outperform, and out-save ANY traditional filter.
It lasts 3× longer, cuts down on waste, slashes maintenance costs, and reduces energy consumption — all while keeping your air cleaner than ever!

  • Lasts 9–12 months — 3× longer than regular filters
  • Lower energy bills & reduced maintenance costs
  • Healthier indoor air for your home or business
  • Better for the environment — less waste, more efficiency

Why settle for outdated, short-lived filters when you can UPGRADE today?
Order now and start saving immediately!

Overview

Tested for years before being released, the Camfil 30/30 Dual 9 is our highest energy saver, with lifetime efficiency and a long service life of 9–12 months. Guaranteed! It lasts 9 months in heavy-load applications and up to 12 months in light to moderate ones.

It also reduces the need for coil and system cleaning by up to 50% compared with lower-efficiency MERV 8 and MERV 7 filters.

Each Dual 9 replaces three or four standard pleated filters — helping you cut:

  • Waste disposal
  • Landfill impact
  • Annual filtration costs
  • Energy consumption
  • Maintenance time and expense

At the same time, you’ll enjoy cleaner indoor air, as the Dual 9 removes airborne pollen, allergens, and fine dust such as:

  • Mites, textile and carpet fibers, mold spores, lint, cement dust
  • Coal, sanding residue, lead, and particles from humidifiers and nebulizers

Camfil was the first air-filtration manufacturer to provide a written performance guarantee — and they’ve raised the bar even higher. The Dual 9 delivers the lowest Total Cost of Ownership with zero risk. Built to last. Tested for proof.

For details, download the Camfil Performance Guarantee (PDF) .

products.name: Fantech Washable filter 414647 Merv 6 (2 filters)
products.description:
Genuine Fantech 414647 filter kit – MERV 6 – Made in Canada

Upgrade the filtration performance of your Fantech or Direct Air ventilation system with this OEM Fantech replacement filter kit, proudly made in Canada . This kit includes two washable aluminum mesh filters with a MERV 6 rating, providing a higher level of protection by capturing finer airborne particles such as cement dust, household dust, carpet fibres, lint, and insects.

Designed as a direct replacement for the original MERV 3 filter (part number 402041), this enhanced filter is ideal for homeowners seeking improved indoor air quality and better protection for their HRV / ERV system.

Looking for even better filtration? Upgrade to our MERV 8 option for enhanced dust and allergen capture.

Prefer a more economical solution? The MERV 3 filter is the same size and offers reliable basic protection.

HIGHLIGHTS
  • MERV 6
  • Collects cement dust, carpet fibers, debris, lint, and insects
  • Lifespan: 6 months*
  • Exact size: 8.5 × 15 × 0.25 inches
  • 1 package containing 2 filters
  • Part number: 414647
  • Fits Fantech models 2005 or newer**: VHR1404, VHR1405R, VHR150, VHR150R, VER150, SHR150, SHR150R, SHR1504, SER150, and SER1504N
  • Fits Direct Air: PHRVR 160, PHRV 150, PHRV 140
  • Made in Canada

*Filter changes vary with environment; pollutants, allergens, and contaminants influence frequency. With normal usage, vacuum or wash the filter every 2 months, and replace every 6 months.

**Important: Some older units require a different filter size than newer versions. As manufacturers do not clearly distinguish between these versions, we strongly recommend measuring your existing filter before ordering to ensure compatibility.

Other filtration options available: MERV 3 and MERV 6 replacement filters for a range of filtration needs and budgets.

With an initial MERV 8 rating, the PerfectPleat HC M8 filter becomes even more efficient as it holds more dust.

The self-supporting design promotes airflow and maximizes dust holding capacity, resulting in lower pressure drop and reduced energy consumption. Plus, with no wire backing and 100% incinerable construction, these filters are not only more efficient but also more sustainable.

HIGHLIGHTS

  • MERV 8
  • Lifespan: Up to 3 months*
  • Highest-performing self-supported pleated filter - no wire backing needed
  • Low pressure drop and high Dust-Holding Capacity (DHC) reduce energy consumption and overall operating cost
  • Environmentally friendly - fully incinerable or compactable
  • Mechanical efficiency - does not rely on electret charge
  • DuraFlex® Media – Patented Media Design
  • Meets ASHRAE Standard 52.2

products.name: 14x20x2 Furnace Filter Merv 13. (12-pack)
products.description:
MERV 13: Highest Efficiency filtration. The BEST Canadian homeowners can buy! Better performance, superior results for a cleaner, safer home. And at just $19.50 per filter, you’re paying for superior dust and allergen removal without the name brand price tag. Camfil AP-13 is proven to outlast other brands by 20%, featuring the lowest total cost of ownership.

HIGHLIGHTS
  • MERV 13
  • Lifespan: Up to 5 months
  • Exact size: 13 1/2 x 19 1/2 x 1 3/4 inches 
  • Sold in 12-pack ($19.50/each)
OVERVIEW

The 14x20x2 Camfil AP-13 is engineered to deliver the best filtration money can buy for today’s homeowners. Make the smart choice and choose the highest efficiency electrostatic furnace filters guaranteed to reduce dust and allergens. Ideal for those who suffer from allergies and asthma, MERV 13 gives you reliable results from the trusted name in high-quality pleated media filters: Camfil. Please note: because this product is so efficient at removing dust, it can get clogged more readily, prompting replacement sooner than five months in some cases.

COMPATIBILITY

This product should fit any brand of furnace or air conditioner, provided you have measured correctly and ordered the right size. However, because high efficency filters can reduce air flow, we recommend you verify with your system manufacturer regarding specifications to determine if its use can be tolerated. We are not responsible for any damage that may result from installation in a system that is not designed to handle this type of filter.

Please note: 14x20x2 inches is a rounded measurement. You must measure your actual filter before ordering and then compare it with our exact measurements. If you have any questions on how to choose the perfect product for your needs, call us for help. Why pay for those high-priced brand names when you can get amazing efficiency and reliability with the AP-13?

SHIPPING

FREE shipping for Canadian shoppers on all orders, PLUS get your order the next business day when you place an order by 11 a.m. Some restrictions apply.

TO ORDER

Buy with confidence! Order any time of the day or night on our secure website using Visa, MasterCard or PayPal. Prefer to call us instead? We can be reached between 9 a.m. and 4 p.m. Eastern time at (888) 315-0105.

OTHER DETAILS
  • Exact Size: 13 1/2 x 19 1/2 x 1 3/4 inches (34.3 x 49.5 x 4.5 cm)
  • Part number: 406931010
  • Model: AP-13
  • Material: Electrostatic synthetic fibers
  • Color: White
  • Manufactured to high-quality standards
EXTRA MODELS

Available in three additional ranges of filtration quality:

  • MERV 8: Economical
  • MERV 8: Extra long life span
  • MERV 11: High efficiency

products.name: Venmar X series HEPA 21996 Air Exchanger Filter
products.description:
Where to Buy Venmar Filters

If you're ready to breathe cleaner, healthier air, you're in the right place! Whether you prefer the convenience of online shopping or picking up your filters locally, Venmar filters are easily accessible. Don't waste time—order online today and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with fast, reliable shipping across Canada and the U.S.

Overview

Introducing the Venmar X Series HEPA Air Exchanger Filter. This genuine Venmar filter is the ultimate solution for your whole-house air exchanger. It provides 99.97% efficiency in capturing airborne particles as small as 0.3 microns—helping eliminate harmful allergens like mold spores, animal dander, dust, smoke, and even smog.

Don't just clean the air—protect your health! This HEPA filter also helps trap potentially virus-carrying bacterial particles, preventing respiratory issues. With the Venmar HEPA filter, you’re investing in your well-being and a cleaner home.

Compatibility

products.name: 12x12x1 Furnace Filter Merv 8 AAF (12-pack)
products.description:
MERV 8 filter : Upgrade your air filtration system with the PerfectPleat HC M8 by AAF Flanders - the eco-friendly solution. These filters are designed for higher performance and improved efficiency. With an initial MERV 8 rating, the PerfectPleat HC M8 filter becomes even more efficient as it holds more dust.

The self-supporting design promotes airflow and maximizes dust holding capacity, resulting in lower pressure drop and reduced energy consumption. Plus, with no wire backing and 100% incinerable construction, these filters are not only more efficient, but also more sustainable.  

HIGHLIGHTS
  • MERV 8
  • Lifespan: Up to 3 months*
  • Highest-performing self-supported pleated filter - no wire backing needed
  • Low pressure drop and high Dust-Holding Capacity (DHC) reduces energy consumption and overall operating cost
  • Environmentally friendly - fully incinerable or compactable
  • Mechanical efficiency - does not rely on electret charge
  • DuraFlex® Media – Patented Media Design
  • Meets ASHREA Standard 52.2
  • Exact size: 11-1/2 x 11-1/2 x 3/4 inches 
  • Sold in 12-pack

*Please note: Filter changes vary with environment; pollutants, allergens, and contaminants influence frequency.

products.name: Electro-Air EAP900 HEPA Air Cleaner with UVC + PCO
products.description:
PORTABLE 5-IN-1 HEPA AIR CLEANER

With Ultraviolet Light & Photo Catalytic Oxidation

Advanced Air Purification for Healthier Indoor Environments

The Electro-Air 5-in-1 Portable HEPA Air Cleaner delivers industry-leading air filtration and sterilization in one powerful, compact unit. This patent-pending system combines True HEPA filtration, UVC germicidal light (non-ozone producing), and Photo Catalytic Oxidation (PCO) to remove and destroy airborne contaminants, allergens, odors, and harmful gases.

Designed for both residential and commercial applications, this unit significantly improves indoor air quality by targeting particles and pollutants that traditional air cleaners cannot.

Key Benefits

  • Removes 99.97% of airborne particles ≥ 0.3 microns

  • Neutralizes bacteria, viruses, mold spores, and fungi

  • Reduces odors and VOCs such as benzene, toluene, tobacco, cannabis, and cooking odors

  • Ideal for allergy and respiratory sufferers

  • Quiet, powerful, and energy-efficient operation

 

Ideal Applications

  • Homes and offices

  • Allergy and respiratory environments

  • New construction or renovation spaces

  • Homes with pets or smokers

  • Mold, water, or sewer damage areas

  • Garbage disposal rooms

  • Cannabis production and processing facilities

 

Standard Features – 5-Stage Filtration System

1. Carbon Prefilter

  • Protects the HEPA filter

  • Captures lint, hair, and large particles

2. True HEPA Media Filter (99.97%)

  • Removes particles 0.3 microns and larger (1/84,000 of an inch)

  • Captures:

    • Atmospheric and household dust

    • Coal and insecticide dust

    • Pollen, mites, mold spores, fungi

    • Bacteria and viruses

    • Pet dander

    • Cooking smoke and grease

    • Tobacco and cannabis smoke particles

  • Efficiency increases as the filter loads over time

3. Dual UVC Germicidal Lights (Non-Ozone)

  • Two high-output UVC lamps enclosed in a reflective chamber

  • Intensifies UV exposure to neutralize microorganisms

4. CinQuartz® Photo Catalytic Oxidation (PCO) Filter

  • High surface-area design allows UV light to penetrate the entire filter

  • Decomposes organic pollutants into H₂O and CO₂

  • Superior absorption throughout the filter—not just the surface

5. Carbon / Potassium Permanganate Final Filter

  • Removes Volatile Organic Compounds (VOCs)

  • Reduces light gases and chemical odors

Performance & Convenience

  • Powerful European variable-speed motor

  • Delivers up to 250 CFM of purified air

  • Energy-efficient operation

  • Plug-in power cord for easy installation

  • Heavy-duty castors for smooth mobility between rooms

Why Choose Electro-Air?

Electro-Air systems are trusted for their medical-grade filtration, advanced purification technologies, and long-term reliability. The 5-in-1 Portable HEPA Air Cleaner offers a comprehensive solution for environments where air quality truly matters.
